title: This AI Chinese model is 15X cheaper?
summary: MiniMax M3 is a long-context AI model that uses Sparse Attention to process documents 15.6x faster and at one-twentieth the compute cost of its predecessor. The model is now available on OpenRouter and filters input to focus on relevant content while ignoring irrelevant portions.
writeup: Jack Roberts covers MiniMax M3, a long-context AI model that applies Sparse Attention to filter input down to relevant content while ignoring the rest. The summary reports the approach processes documents 15.6x faster and at one-twentieth the compute cost of the prior model, which lowers the price of handling long inputs. The model is available on OpenRouter.
